title: schkuhria anthemoidea var. guatemalensis
intro: Schkuhria anthemoidea var. guatemalensis, commonly known as Guatemalan Blazing Star or Guatemalan Yerba de la Reina, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of digestive issues, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Guatemalan Blazing Star can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
